howItWorks.intro: This travel rewards value calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Cash Value = Points x Cents Per Point / 100
Cents Per Point = Base Value x Redemption Multiplier
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: What is the best way to redeem points?
faq.answer: Transfer to airline partners for business/first class flights gives the highest value (2-5+ cents per point). Travel portal bookings give standard value (1.25-1.5 cpp). Cash back gives the worst value (0.5-1.0 cpp).

faq.question: How much are hotel points worth?
faq.answer: Hotel points are worth 0.4-0.8 cents each on average. Marriott: ~0.7 cpp, Hilton: ~0.5 cpp, Hyatt: ~1.5 cpp (best hotel program). Always compare the points cost to the cash rate of the same room.

howWeCalculate.intro: This travel rewards value calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs
Results are calculated instantly in your browser — nothing is sent to a server
Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
howWeCalculate.disclaimer: These calculations are estimates based on standard formulas. For critical decisions, always consult a qualified professional.

whenToUse.intro: This travel rewards value calculator is designed for anyone who needs quick, reliable estimates.
scenarios: When you need a quick estimate before committing to a purchase or project
When comparing different options or scenarios side by side
When planning a budget and need to understand potential costs
When you want to verify a quote or estimate you've received
When teaching or learning about the concepts behind these calculations
